parsed.mechanism: A similarity-preserving router induces token-wise relational structure via orthogonality in its weights, which routes tokens to fast-weight experts whose hidden states are themselves models updated by self-supervised test-time training, so relational geometry regulates which expert undergoes test-time learning on each token.
parsed.transfer: SimBal's orthogonality-based, similarity-preserving routing loss transfers from MoE load balancing to govern expert selection in a test-time-training architecture where each expert's hidden state is a self-supervised learner.
parsed.open_problem: Does enforcing router orthogonality that preserves token similarity improve the stability and generalization of expert-wise test-time training compared to standard load-balancing losses?
parsed.primary_quote: a novel load balancing auxiliary loss that maintains token-wise relational structure by softly encouraging orthogonality in the router weights

envelopes.result: {"mechanism": "A similarity-preserving router induces token-wise relational structure via orthogonality in its weights, which routes tokens to fast-weight experts whose hidden states are themselves models updated by self-supervised test-time training, so relational geometry regulates which expert undergoes test-time learning on each token.", "transfer": "SimBal's orthogonality-based, similarity-preserving routing loss transfers from MoE load balancing to govern expert selection in a test-time-training architecture where each expert's hidden state is a self-supervised learner.", "open_problem": "Does enforcing router orthogonality that preserves token similarity improve the stability and generalization of expert-wise test-time training compared to standard load-balancing losses?", "niche_name": "Similarity-Preserving Routing for Test-Time-Training Mixture-of-Experts", "primary_quote": "a novel load balancing auxiliary loss that maintains token-wise relational structure by softly encouraging orthogonality in the router weights", "quote_source": "atom_a"}
